description: Biggins Lacy Shapiro & Company, LLC (BLS & Co.) helps some of the world’s largest corporations identify the best locations, secure incentives, obtain development approvals and optimize energy strategies. Location Economics™, the firm’s trademarked multi-disciplinary approach, focuses on creating value for companies and their communities. BLS & Co. is headquartered in Princeton, N.J., with offices in New York, Chicago, Cleveland and Walnut Creek, CA.
